findings.title: Timeout-enforcement dead code path when _agent_timeout == 0
findings.problem: if _agent_timeout and elapsed > _agent_timeout silently skips when _agent_timeout is 0 (falsy)
findings.fix: Use explicit comparison: if _agent_timeout > 0 and elapsed > _agent_timeout

findings.title: Byte offset capture for auth-error detection is racy
findings.problem: Captures _agent_log_start_offset BEFORE file is opened for append. Early subprocess output may be missed by auth-error scan.
findings.fix: Capture offset AFTER opening file, or use temp file with atomic rename

findings.title: Consensus baseline consumed when ranging dampening suppresses trigger
findings.problem: triggered_consensus updated even when trigger suppressed. Next cycle misses valid consensus crossing.
findings.fix: Update triggered_consensus only when trigger actually fires

findings.title: Module global _agent_timeout stale during reentrancy
findings.problem: _agent_timeout overwritten by new tier. Old agent killed with wrong timeout.
findings.fix: Use dict keyed by pid: {pid: timeout}

findings.title: _agent_log_start_offset not cleared on completion
findings.problem: Inconsistent cleanup pattern; stale state persists.

findings.title: Stack overflow auto-disable is sticky
findings.problem: Once counter reaches 5, no agent spawned, so never completes, never resets. Permanent lockout.

findings.title: Startup grace period flag ignored on in-process restart
findings.problem: Module-level flag not reset on loop restart. Spurious triggers on restart.
findings.fix: Tie grace period to process PID

findings.title: Decision feedback loop O(N) full-journal scans
findings.problem: Every invocation scans entire journal. Scales poorly over weeks.

findings.title: ThreadPoolExecutor futures not actually killed on timeout
findings.problem: cancel() is best-effort. Worker threads leak resources.
findings.fix: Add 5s grace period + log still-running threads

findings.title: Timeout kill failure not persisted
findings.problem: kill_ok=False lost. Hung agent indistinguishable from killed agent in logs.
findings.fix: Include kill_status field in returned dict

findings.title: classify_tier() uses UTC for day-of-week, wrong at UTC/CET boundary
findings.problem: now_utc.weekday() wrong date at midnight UTC. Tier misclassified.
findings.fix: Use CET time for market_open check

findings.title: Heartbeat daemon killed abruptly on loop exit
findings.problem: Daemon thread has 2s to exit while writing health_state.json. File corruption risk.
findings.fix: Gracefully drain daemon before main thread exits

findings.title: Broad exception handling masks import errors
findings.problem: ALL exceptions swallowed when locating claude. ImportError converts to silent fallback.
